Subject: Request for Brief Extension on Contract Review Deadline

Dear [Opposing Counsel],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to request a brief extension of one week on our current contract-review deadline. The additional time would allow us to complete our review thoroughly and ensure that any comments or proposed revisions we share are well-considered and constructive.

Please let me know at your earliest convenience whether a one-week extension would be acceptable. We appreciate your flexibility and look forward to continuing to work together productively on this matter.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
